lines.speaker: Zenesha
lines.text: Hello there! I sell plate mail bodies, are you interested?

lines.speaker: Zenesha
lines.text: Hello there! I sell plate mail bodies, are you interested?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm here to tell you about some new taxes.

lines.speaker: Zenesha
lines.text: I'm already paying my taxes though?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: These are new ones. They are to help pay for the king's upcoming visit to Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Zenesha
lines.text: Well I don't see why I have to pay for that! If the king can't afford the trip, then maybe he shouldn't be going!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's an important diplomatic trip I'm afraid so it has to go ahead. The first payment will be collected soon.

lines.speaker: Zenesha
lines.text: And he's getting a mourner to tell me this? Nice try.

lines.speaker: Zenesha
lines.text: And he's getting a citizen to tell me this? Nice try.
